from the meeting.


To the surprise and chagrin or
other republican members of the
council, Acting Mayor Boyd was in
fiuenced by the threat of Councilman
Pratt and promised to withdraw the
appointment, which was done.


When reproached by his republican
colleagues last night for being bluff
ed by Pratt, the acting mayor gave
as his excuse that the Washington
Water Power franchise for Hangman
creek bridge would be up and that
the company expected the matter to
be put through with a rush.


Then Mr.. Pratt double crossed
the acting mayor and the Washing
ton Water Power company. by spring.
ing the popular proposition that the
water power company pay the city
$4,000 for the privilege of using the
bridge. AS expected. this stalled of
the franchise. Who wins?
